title: Physical system nodes
description: Schema for shared/physical_system_nodes.csv. Physical system nodes define the navigation hierarchy for physical roles without relying on reporting allocations.

description.description: Plain-language description of the physical node.

parent_node_id.description: Parent physical node identifier. Blank only for the root node.

node_kind.description: Physical node class used for navigation and validation.

boundary.description: Physical boundary represented by the node.

display_order.description: Stable ordering for navigation and documentation.
